name: portfolio-profile-links-step-collects-handles-and-focus
description: Developer-niche portfolio user at WEB_COLLECT_PORTFOLIO_PROFILE pastes 'github.com/alexrivera linkedin.com/in/alex-rivera, building a real-time payments API'. The shared links parser must pull username-only handles (githubHandle/linkedinHandle — unlock the GitHub section + social CTAs) and the leftover sentence becomes currentFocus. Marks portfolioProfileDone and advances into the projects step.

websiteData.aboutText: Full-stack engineer who ships fast, reliable web apps.
